activePartnerSlots.minimumActivityRule: Active only when they have sent at least one qualified opportunity in the last 60 days or two in the last quarter.
activePartnerSlots.partnerOffer: 24-hour funding view, white-labelled client review, clear referral fee, co-branded funding article where relevant.
activePartnerSlots.nextAction: Identify named principal, connect on LinkedIn, email introducer proposition, follow with phone call.
